nasb.text: “Go and speak to David, saying, ‘Thus says the Lord, “I offer you three things; choose for yourself one of them, which I will do to you.” ’ ”

esv.text: “Go and say to David, ‘Thus says the Lord, Three things I offer you; choose one of them, that I may do it to you.’”

cnv.text: “你去告訴大衛，說：‘耶和華這樣說：我給你提出三件事，你可以選擇一件，我好向你施行。’”

ccb.text: “你去告诉大卫，我有三样灾祸，他可以选择让我降哪一样给他。”
